sections.paragraph:
Original: אי־כבוד

Transliteration: 'ı̂y-kâbôd

Phonetic: ee-kaw-bode'

BDB Definition:

Ichabod = "no glory"
  1. a son of Phinehas, so named because of the capture of the Ark by the Philistines

Origin: from H336 and H3519

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
